description: 3-question M0 validation test for 12-blade plow — exercises all 12 blades

questions.question: What is the approximate boiling point of water at standard atmospheric pressure?
questions.note: Exercises blades 1-9 + blade 12 (known fact with downstream physics application). Blade 4 should NOT quarantine (clear factual answer). Blade 12 fires due to downstream_seed.

questions.question: Is consciousness solely a product of physical brain processes?
questions.note: THEORY_OPEN class triggers Andon-Cord quarantine (blade 4) + blade 10 consequence probes. Blade 10 probes testable consequences of consciousness-physicalism claim.

questions.question: Can objects travel faster than light in a vacuum according to special relativity?
choices: No, the speed of light is absolute
options: No, the speed of light is absolute
questions.correct_answer: No, the speed of light is absolute

pre_loaded_contradiction.known_fact: Special relativity (Einstein 1905) establishes c as invariant upper speed limit for matter/information

questions.note: Blade 11 finds pre-loaded contradiction and confirms elimination of FTL theory. Code Breaker queue entry generated.
